nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Baasha and what he did and his might, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Baasha and what he did, and his might, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?

cnv.text: 巴沙其餘的事蹟，他所行的，以及他的英勇事蹟，不是都記在以色列諸王的年代誌上嗎？

ccb.text: 巴沙其他的事及其一切所作所为和成就都记在以色列的列王史上。
